title: xeranthemum papillosum
intro: Xeranthemum papillosum is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as the woolly daisy or downy daisy, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Xeranthemum papillosum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Xeranthemum papillosum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
